ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, agent, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label assigned to the property */,
  "label_description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_categories" (
  "income_cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income category */,
  "income_cat_name" TEXT /* Name of the income category (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income category */,
  "min_income" INTEGER /* Minimum income for this category */,
  "max_income" INTEGER /* Maximum income for this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of housing age (e.g., '0-10 years', '11-20 years') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age category */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for this category */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for this review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property related to the trend */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend observation */,
  "median_price" REAL /* Median price in the market on that date */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of sales recorded on that date */,
  "market_index" REAL /* Market index (e.g., 0-100) indicating market conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State abbreviation */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood name of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, new listing) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value associated with the alert (e.g., new price) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was sent to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the interaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, save) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID associated with the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type used for the session (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device (e.g., Windows, macOS, Android) */,
  "device_browser" TEXT /* Browser used on the device (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
